typography.font_source: assets/archivo.css (variable woff2 embedded as base64, extracted from reference)

pattern.kicker: centered uppercase label between two horizontal rules
pattern.headline: centered, one accent word in primary color
pattern.swipe_cue: SWIPE FOR MORE + primary chip with chevron
pattern.progress: primary dash for active slide + muted dots
pattern.edge_affordance: circled chevron at right edge, headline height (slide 1 only)
